title: VIBENGODING.ID
subtitle: Platform Belajar Vibe Coding Gratis
description: Website edukasi vibe coding bahasa Indonesia. Berisi courses gratis, tools developer, dan panduan lengkap coding dengan AI. Dibangun dengan Next.js 16, Tailwind CSS v4, dan NextAuth.
features: Sistem auth dengan Google via NextAuth
SEO optimized dengan JSON-LD structured data
Responsive dark mode UI dengan grain texture
masterPrompt:
Buatkan website edukasi VIBENGODING.ID — platform belajar vibe coding gratis untuk developer Indonesia.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 16 (App Router) + React 19 + TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4 (@theme inline, dark mode)
- NextAuth v5 (beta) dengan Google OAuth
- Framer Motion untuk animasi
- Lucide React untuk icons
- Google Analytics 4

## Design System
Dark mode ultra gelap:
- Background: #050505, Card: #111111, Border: #1a1a1a
- Accent: Merah #E50914
- Font: Syne (heading bold), Space Grotesk (body), JetBrains Mono (code)
- Efek: grain texture overlay (SVG noise), glow effects, gradient borders
- Grid pattern background di hero
- Selection color merah
- Scrollbar thin custom

## Halaman & Fitur

### 1. Landing Page (/)
Sections dengan scroll animations (Framer Motion whileInView):

**Navbar:**
- Fixed top, backdrop-blur on scroll
- Logo "V" merah + "VIBENGODING.ID"
- Links: Courses, Projects, PromptKit, Tools, About
- Auth: tombol "Masuk" → Google Sign In, atau avatar + nama user + "Keluar"
- Mobile: hamburger menu dengan AnimatePresence

**Hero:**
- Badge: "100% Free — No BS, No Paywall" dengan dot pulse
- Judul besar font Syne: "Belajar Vibe Coding" (merah glow) + "Gratis. Selamanya."
- Subtitle deskriptif
- Terminal mockup: typing animation "npx vibengoding init --vibe 🔥" (karakter per 60ms)
- 2 CTA buttons: "Mulai Belajar" (merah solid) + "Lihat Tools" (border)
- Stats: 6+ Courses, 60+ Lessons, FREE Selamanya
- Ambient blur blobs merah + bottom fade gradient

**Courses Section (#courses):**
- Badge "FREE COURSES" + heading "Semua Course, Gratis."
- Grid 3 kolom, 6 course cards:
  1. Vibe Coding 101 — 12 lessons, 3 jam, Pemula, warna #E50914
  2. AI-Powered Frontend — 8 lessons, 2.5 jam, Menengah, warna #00D4FF
  3. Full-Stack Vibes — 15 lessons, 5 jam, Menengah, warna #FF6B6B
  4. Prompt Engineering Pro — 10 lessons, 3.5 jam, Semua Level, warna #C084FC
  5. Ship It! Deploy Guide — 7 lessons, 2 jam, Pemula, warna #FFA726
  6. Cursor & Copilot Mastery — 9 lessons, 2.5 jam, Semua Level, warna #4ECDC4
- Setiap card: icon, level badge, title (Syne), subtitle (mono), description, tags (warna per course), footer (lessons count + durasi + tombol "Mulai")
- Card link ke /courses/[slug]

**PromptKit Section:**
- Featured showcase dengan gradient ungu
- Info + browser mockup preview di grid 2 kolom
- Link ke /promptkit/

**Tools Section (#tools):**
- Grid 2 kolom, 4 tools: VibeGen CLI (Stable), PromptKit (New), VibeUI Components (Beta), DeployBot (Coming Soon)
- Status badges berwarna

**About Section (#about):**
- Story card + 3 values: No BS, Community First, Always Free

**CTA Section:**
- "Ready to Vibe?" + tombol besar

**Footer:**
- Logo + navigation links + GitHub/Twitter icons

### 2. Courses System

**Data-driven:** Setiap course didefinisikan di file TypeScript terpisah:
- courses-data.ts — index semua courses
- course-*.ts — konten per course (lessons dengan markdown)

**Course structure:**
```
Course { slug, title, subtitle, description, lessons[], color, icon, tags, level, duration }
Lesson { id, slug, title, duration, content (markdown string) }
```

**/courses** — List semua courses (grid cards)
**/courses/[slug]** — Detail course + daftar lessons
**/courses/[slug]/[lessonId]** — Lesson viewer (perlu auth, proteksi via middleware)

### 3. Auth (NextAuth v5)
- Google OAuth provider
- src/auth.ts config
- app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts handler
- SessionProvider wrapper di layout
- Middleware proteksi route /courses/[slug]/[lessonId]
- /login page dengan tombol Google

### 4. SEO
- Metadata lengkap: title template, description, 20+ keywords Bahasa Indonesia
- JSON-LD: EducationalOrganization, WebSite (SearchAction), ItemList (6 courses)
- robots.ts: allow all + sitemap
- sitemap.ts: dynamic dari semua routes
- opengraph-image.tsx: generated OG image
- Google Analytics 4 (gtag)

Semua teks UI dalam Bahasa Indonesia. Bahasa casual/santai (lo/gue/kamu).

steps.title: Setup Next.js 16 + Auth
steps.description: Inisialisasi project Next.js 16 dengan App Router, Tailwind CSS v4, dan NextAuth v5 untuk Google login.

prompts.title: Init Next.js Project
prompts.description: Buat project Next.js baru dengan semua config
prompts.prompt:
npx create-next-app@latest vibengoding --typescript --tailwind --app --src-dir
cd vibengoding
npm install next-auth@beta motion lucide-react

prompts.title: NextAuth v5 Setup
prompts.prompt:
Setup NextAuth v5 (beta) untuk Next.js 16 App Router:
- Google OAuth provider
- File auth.ts di src/
- Route handler di app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
- SessionProvider wrapper component
- Middleware untuk proteksi route /courses/[slug]/[lessonId]
- Login page di /login dengan tombol "Masuk dengan Google"

steps.title: Design System & Landing Page
steps.description: Buat design system dark mode dengan warna merah (#E50914) dan layout landing page lengkap.

prompts.title: Landing Page Sections
prompts.prompt:
Buatkan landing page untuk platform belajar coding gratis VIBENGODING.ID:

Design: Dark mode sangat gelap (#050505), accent merah (#E50914), font Syne + Space Grotesk + JetBrains Mono

Sections:
1. Navbar — fixed, blur bg on scroll, logo, links, auth button
2. Hero — badge "100% Free", title besar "Belajar Vibe Coding", terminal mockup dengan typing animation, CTA buttons, stats
3. Courses — grid 3 kolom, card dengan color accent per course, tags, lesson count
4. PromptKit Feature — showcase section khusus dengan browser mockup preview
5. Tools — grid 2 kolom, status badges (Stable/Beta/New/Coming Soon)
6. About — story section + 3 values (No BS, Community First, Always Free)
7. CTA — closing section "Ready to Vibe?"
8. Footer — links + socials

Semua pakai Framer Motion untuk animasi scroll. Bahasa Indonesia.

steps.title: Course System & Content
steps.description: Build sistem courses dengan data-driven approach. Setiap course punya lessons, dan setiap lesson punya konten lengkap.

prompts.title: Course Data Structure
prompts.description: Bikin data model dan konten courses
prompts.prompt:
Buatkan sistem course untuk VIBENGODING.ID:

Struktur data:
- Course: slug, title, subtitle, description, lessons[], color, icon, tags, level, duration
- Lesson: id, slug, title, duration, content (markdown string)

Buat data lengkap untuk 6 courses:
1. Vibe Coding 101 (12 lessons) — dari setup sampai deploy
2. AI-Powered Frontend (8 lessons) — UI dengan AI
3. Full-Stack Vibes (15 lessons) — backend + frontend
4. Prompt Engineering Pro (10 lessons) — master prompting
5. Ship It! Deploy Guide (7 lessons) — deploy ke production
6. Cursor & Copilot Mastery (9 lessons) — AI editors

Setiap lesson punya konten markdown lengkap. Bahasa Indonesia.

Pages:
- /courses — list semua courses
- /courses/[slug] — detail course + list lessons
- /courses/[slug]/[lessonId] — lesson viewer (perlu auth)

steps.title: SEO & Performance
steps.description: Optimasi SEO dengan metadata, JSON-LD structured data, sitemap, robots.txt, dan Open Graph images.

prompts.title: SEO Setup Lengkap
prompts.prompt:
Optimasi SEO untuk VIBENGODING.ID (Next.js 16 App Router):

1. Layout metadata — title template, description, keywords bahasa Indonesia (vibe coding, belajar coding gratis, dll), OG image, Twitter card
2. JSON-LD schemas — EducationalOrganization, WebSite dengan SearchAction, ItemList untuk courses, Course schema per course
3. robots.ts — allow all, sitemap reference
4. sitemap.ts — dynamic sitemap dari semua routes + courses
5. opengraph-image.tsx — generated OG image dengan judul site
6. Google Analytics 4 — gtag setup di layout

Target keywords: vibe coding, belajar vibe coding, belajar coding gratis, bikin website pakai AI, prompt engineering, dll.

lessons: Next.js 16 App Router + Tailwind v4 dengan @theme inline sangat powerful
NextAuth v5 beta masih sering berubah — pin versi spesifik
JSON-LD structured data penting untuk SEO education sites
Typing animation di hero section sangat meningkatkan engagement
Grain texture overlay bikin dark mode terasa premium
